items.title: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.summary: OpenAI announces advancements in secure access for cybersecurity applications using its new GPT-5.5 and specialized GPT-5.5-Cyber models.

items.title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
items.summary: OpenAI has released new advanced voice intelligence capabilities for its API, allowing developers to integrate more sophisticated speech recognition and synthesis into their applications.

items.title: Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API
items.summary: OpenAI is enhancing its API with new models that significantly improve voice intelligence capabilities, offering more nuanced and accurate speech processing.

items.title: OpenSearch-VL: An Open Recipe for Frontier Multimodal Search Agents
items.summary: Introduces OpenSearch-VL, an open-source framework designed to create advanced multimodal search agents capable of understanding and processing various data types.

items.title: OpenAI introduces new ‘Trusted Contact’ safeguard for cases of possible self-harm
items.summary: OpenAI has implemented a new 'Trusted Contact' feature to provide a safeguard for users, enabling intervention in situations where self-harm might be indicated.

items.title: Stream-R1: Reliability-Perplexity Aware Reward Distillation for Streaming Video Generation
items.summary: Introduces Stream-R1, a method for streaming video generation that uses reliability-perplexity aware reward distillation to improve performance.

items.title: Stream-T1: Test-Time Scaling for Streaming Video Generation
items.summary: Presents Stream-T1, a technique for test-time scaling in streaming video generation to enhance output quality and efficiency.

items.title: Voi founders’ new AI startup Pit has become the latest rising star out of Stockholm
items.summary: The founders of Voi have launched a new AI startup called Pit, which is quickly gaining recognition as a prominent emerging company in Stockholm's tech scene.

items.title: RLDX-1 Technical Report
items.summary: Provides a technical report on RLDX-1, likely a new model or framework for reinforcement learning, detailing its architecture and performance.

items.title: HERMES++: Toward a Unified Driving World Model for 3D Scene Understanding and Generation
items.summary: Proposes HERMES++, a unified world model aimed at improving 3D scene understanding and generation specifically for autonomous driving applications.

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
items.summary: Google's AI blog summarizes its key AI announcements and updates from April 2026, covering various product and research advancements.

items.title: I built a 200 line AI router in TypeScript. My monthly bill dropped 41%.
items.summary: A developer shares how building a small AI router in TypeScript significantly reduced their monthly cloud service costs by 41%.

items.title: Anthropic just rented Elon Musk's data center. The price of a Claude token is about to make sense.
items.summary: Anthropic's reported rental of Elon Musk's data center suggests a strategic move to scale operations, potentially impacting the cost structure of their Claude AI tokens.

items.title: Cloudflare and Stripe just let agents buy domains and ship code. Here is the API.
items.summary: Cloudflare and Stripe have reportedly released APIs that enable AI agents to autonomously purchase domains and deploy code, signaling a new era for automated development workflows.

items.title: Mojo v1.0.0b1
items.summary: Mojo, a new programming language designed for AI development, announces its v1.0.0b1 release, indicating significant progress towards a stable version.
